title: Fermented Crispy Canadian Peanuts Stir-fry
description: A nostalgic dish featuring crispy fermented Canadian peanuts simmered with a touch of sweetness and savory seasoning for an irresistible snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix kosher salt and vegetable oil until evenly distributed. Add fermented peanuts and toss to coat.
Spread the peanut mixture on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for about 20-25 minutes or until crunchy and golden brown.
While the peanuts are baking, in a small mixing bowl, combine coconut sugar, sesame seeds, and fermented black beans. Mix well.
Once the peanuts are done, spread them out again on the same baking sheet and sprinkle the mixture evenly over the peanut surface.
Let it sit for another 10-15 minutes until fully coated.
Garnish with sliced scallions before serving.
